diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al
index c46c8c20..4d40b8b6 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al
@@ -1309,7 +1309,7 @@ codeunit 99000774 "Calculate Routing Line"
         end;
 
         MaxLotSize :=
-          ExpectedOperOutput *
+          ProdOrderQty *
           (1 + ProdOrderRoutingLine."Scrap Factor % (Accumulated)") *
           (1 + TotalScrap / 100) +
           ProdOrderRoutingLine."Fixed Scrap Qty. (Accum.)";

             exit;
 
+        if PurchaseLine.IsNonInventoriableItem() then
+            exit;
+
         Job.Get(PurchaseLine."Job No.");
         if Job.GetQuantityAvailable(PurchaseLine."No.", PurchaseLine."Location Code", PurchaseLine."Variant Code", 0, 2) <
            -PurchaseLine."Return Qty. to Ship (Base)"

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al

@@ -563,9 +563,10 @@ table 7000 "Price List Header"
         xAmountType: Enum "Price Amount Type";
     begin
         xAmountType := "Amount Type";
-        if "Source Type" in ["Source Type"::"Customer Disc. Group", "Source Type"::"Customer Price Group"] then
-            "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType()
-        else
+        if "Source Type" in ["Source Type"::"Customer Disc. Group", "Source Type"::"Customer Price Group"] then begin
+            CopyTo(PriceSource);
+            "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType();
+        end else
             "Amount Type" := CalcAmountType();
         if "Amount Type" <> xAmountType then
             Modify()
